| 2026-03-17 | feat | Add expert_llm skill for agent/chat apps with Synthetic API | Skill at skills/expert_llm/ with scaffold script, SKILL.md, code templates (Python/JS). Integrated into AGENTS_EXPERT.md and speckit_plan. |
| 2026-03-17 | config | Decommission Coolify fallback — Docker-only deploys | Removed Coolify fallback branches from /deploy, /deploy-staging, /deploy-status endpoints. Docker socket required, returns 503 if unavailable. lib/coolify.py and DB UUID columns left as dead code. Refactor plan Phase 5 was already documented at docs/plans/2026-03-06-expert-deploy-refactor.md. |
| 2026-03-17 | fix | Fix expert/explorations URL routing — 3 root causes | (1) list_conversations() filtered out conv_type='project', hiding them from sidebar — don't include them, expert has its own nav. (2) /explorations/{id} didn't redirect project convs to /expert/ — added conv_url() helper + redirect guard. (3) stream.js hardcoded replaceState('/explorations/...') overwriting expert URLs — added /expert/ path guard. Always test with Playwright click flows, not just curl. |
| 2026-03-17 | config | Deploy workflow: deploy-remote.sh --quick only patches mounted volumes | Static files (JS/CSS), web/, lib/ are baked into Docker image — need full rebuild. Only skills/ (bind mount ro), data/ (bind mount rw), and credentials/ (bind mount rw) are patchable via quick deploy. Always push credentials after full rebuild (container recreate wipes bind mount content from previous scp). |
| 2026-03-17 | fix | Auto-reconcile .specify/ artifacts + auto-retry Gitea repo creation | Agent writes spec/plan to project root instead of .specify/specs/v1/ — reconcile_specify_artifacts() copies them before git commit. Gitea repo creation fails silently in background thread — deploy endpoints now auto-retry instead of 400. git clone fails on non-empty dirs — use git init + push for existing projects. Retry button added to settings page. |
| 2026-03-17 | fix | Gitea clone vs init: non-empty project dirs need git init, not clone | git clone refuses to write into a dir that already has files. When Gitea repo creation is retried after agent has already written code, use git init + remote add + commit + push instead. The has_files check at line ~393 of expert.py handles this. |
| 2026-03-18 | feat | Inject SYNTHETIC env vars into agent prompt + subprocess | Two layers: (1) _build_project_prompt() tells agent the API exists. (2) cli.py injects SYNTHETIC_API_URL/KEY into subprocess env so agent's test scripts can call it. Server .env must also have the vars (deploy-remote.sh excludes .env from rsync). After adding to server .env, need `docker compose up -d` (not restart) to re-read env_file. |
| 2026-03-18 | fix | Proxy fetch() rewrite + Synthetic model fixes (3 root causes) | (1) Deployed apps using fetch('/api/...') bypassed proxy — added fetch+XHR monkey-patch in _rewrite_proxy_html. (2) Synthetic requires hf: prefix on model names (e.g. hf:zai-org/GLM-4.7) — 400 without it. (3) GLM-4.7 is a reasoning model: returns content in reasoning_content, not content — skill templates now check both fields. Also: docker-compose.yml env defaults override code defaults — always check compose env vars when debugging. |
| 2026-03-18 | fix | Spec files lost during deploy cycles — git checkout wipes untracked dirs | .specify/ was created by speckit_init outside git, then the deploy cycle (git checkout staging) wiped it. Recovered from initial commit (acce9b6 on main branch). Lesson: reconcile_specify_artifacts runs post-response but does not protect against branch switches. Consider committing .specify/ to staging branch. |
| 2026-03-18 | docs | PENDING REVIEW: merge plan main→mode_expert | 10 conflicts expected (Makefile, entrypoint.sh, conftest, cli.py, app.py, config.py, database.py, db.py, pm.py, auth.py, conversations.py). Schema v21-v24 safe (main only reformatted). No file deletions. Plan: pull main, checkout merge_expert from mode_expert, merge main, resolve, test, push merge_expert. Full plan at ~/.claude/plans/floating-gliding-tarjan.md |
| 2026-03-24 | fix | Fix SYNTHETIC_API_KEY not reaching deployed containers (rare-lotus crash loop) | Root cause: docker_deploy.py passed env vars via subprocess env (line 198) but compose only uses those for ${} interpolation, not container env. Dead code at lines 184-186 built -e args but never added them to cmd. Fix: _write_deploy_env() writes .deploy.env + compose override with env_file directive, used by both deploy() and restart(). Initial fix over-engineered (patched compose YAML inline) — simplified to compose -f override pattern. Regex for service names must exclude volumes/networks sections. |
| 2026-03-24 | fix | LLM apps sending Synthetic API requests every 30s while idle | Agent-generated /health endpoint called llm_service.test_connection() which sends a real chat.completions.create request. Docker healthcheck hits /health every 30s = billable API call per idle app. Fix: added rule 7 to skills/expert_llm/SKILL.md and callout in AGENTS_EXPERT.md — health endpoints must not call external APIs, only check local state. |
| 2026-03-24 | feat | Add "Publier sur Scaleway" — serverless container publish for expert apps | New modules: lib/scaleway_publish.py (orchestrator), lib/scaleway_registry.py (build+push to SCW Container Registry), lib/scaleway_rdb.py (per-app PG on shared managed instance). 3 API endpoints (publish/unpublish/status). UI button with confirm() dialog in settings page. DB migration v25 adds scaleway_container_id/url/db_url. Docker deploy unchanged — Scaleway is additive, explicit, user-confirmed. Anti-Coolify: no webhooks, no auto-deploy, clear per-step errors, status always queries live API. |
| 2026-03-24 | config | Scaleway managed PG quirks | Connect to `postgres` db not `rdb` (CONNECT denied on rdb even for admins). CREATE DATABASE ... OWNER fails (can't SET ROLE) — use CREATE DATABASE + GRANT ALL instead. ALTER DATABASE OWNER TO also fails — skip it. All SCW credentials go in server .env only. |
| 2026-03-24 | config | Fix docker-compose.yml service name mismatch (autometa vs matometa) | Base compose had service `autometa`, prod override had `matometa` — caused two containers fighting for port 5002. Fixed base to use `matometa`. When using compose overrides, service names MUST match across files. Also: `docker compose up -d` without --force-recreate won't re-read env_file changes — need --force-recreate. |
